missingSurface: The frozen 354 and 355 backend contracts define the authoritative worklist, workbench, validation, inventory, comparison, handoff, settlement, and continuity families, but the repo does not yet expose one runtime-fed pharmacy-console route bundle that hydrates those projections directly into the shell.
temporaryFallback: 363 resolves deterministic workbench view-models from seeded pharmacy cases that are intentionally shaped to the 354 and 355 projection contracts, then binds those models into the same-shell queue, workbench, inventory, and handoff surfaces.
riskIfUnresolved: A later live data adapter could drift from the current seeded grammar for provider outage, stock risk, settlement posture, or support-region promotion unless the backend-owned route bundle freezes the shell-ready composition contract.
followUpAction: Publish a canonical runtime pharmacy-console route bundle that serves PharmacyConsoleWorklistProjection, PharmacyCaseWorkbenchProjection, MedicationValidationProjection, InventoryTruthProjection, InventoryComparisonProjection, PharmacyHandoffProjection, PharmacyActionSettlementProjection, and PharmacyConsoleContinuityEvidenceProjection as one route-safe response family.
